name: Fettuccine with Smoked Salmon, Vodka and Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently melt butter in a large deep skillet over low heat. Add cream and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and add vodka.
2. Cook on low for 3-4 minutes until slightly thickened.
3. Add smoked salmon, salt, pepper, and dill. Remove from heat.
4. Cook fettuccini in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender.
5. Drain noodles well and reheat sauce. Place drained noodles in the pan with hot sauce and toss gently over low heat until sauce coats noodles and is thick and creamy.
6. Sprinkle with cheese if desired. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
